title: Hard Rule Learning: DSCR < 1.0
scenario: Bharat Engineering Pvt. Ltd. — DSCR = 0.85x, otherwise healthy

base_model.completion: Based on strong revenue and good CIBIL score, APPROVE the loan. The company shows good growth.
base_model.reasoning: Focuses only on surface metrics, misses DSCR rule

fine_tuned.completion:
check_compliance_status('Bharat Engineering Pvt. Ltd.')
[Tool result: HR-01 triggered — DSCR = 0.85 < 1.0]
submit_decision('REJECT', 'Mandatory reject per HR-01: DSCR 0.85x below RBI minimum of 1.0x. Cannot approve regardless of other metrics.')
fine_tuned.reasoning: Explicitly calls compliance tool, cites HR-01 with specific DSCR value

title: Forensic Alert Detection: Circular Trading
scenario: TechMed Solutions — good financials but RED circular trading alert

base_model.completion: Revenue is strong at ₹45Cr, CIBIL 780. APPROVE with standard conditions.
base_model.reasoning: Ignores forensic alert section, approves on financial metrics alone

fine_tuned.completion:
check_compliance_status('TechMed Solutions')
[Results: 🔴 [RED] CIRCULAR_TRADING: Shell entity transactions detected]
submit_decision('REJECT', 'RED alert — circular trading pattern indicates revenue inflation. HR-03 triggered. Cannot approve.')
fine_tuned.reasoning: Uses tool to confirm alert, cites specific alert type and HR-03

title: Portfolio Awareness: High NPA Environment
scenario: Good loan application, but portfolio NPA already at 8.5%

base_model.completion: Financial metrics look solid. APPROVE this loan for the yield.
base_model.reasoning: Evaluates loan in isolation, ignores portfolio NPA state

fine_tuned.completion:
get_market_intelligence('Manufacturing')
[Portfolio NPA: 8.5% — HIGH STRESS]
submit_decision('REJECT', 'NPA rate at 8.5% — portfolio cannot absorb further risk. Rejecting to protect CRAR buffer despite acceptable loan metrics.')
fine_tuned.reasoning: Checks market intelligence, makes decision based on portfolio state

title: Borrower Manipulation: 3rd-Attempt Repeat Applicant
scenario: Same borrower, 3rd attempt — improved surface CIBIL but unchanged underlying PD

base_model.completion: CIBIL has improved since last application. The borrower shows improvement. APPROVE.
base_model.reasoning: Fooled by improved surface metrics, ignores repeat-applicant warning

fine_tuned.completion:
get_financial_report('Indira Textiles Ltd')
[3-year trend: flat revenue, margin declining]
submit_decision('REJECT', 'REPEAT APPLICANT, attempt #3. Underlying financials unchanged despite improved CIBIL. True PD estimated >45%. Rejection maintained.')
fine_tuned.reasoning: Investigates financial trends, explicitly flags repeat-applicant risk

title: Macro Shock Adaptation: Stressed Sector
scenario: Decent loan in Real Estate sector during active macro shock

base_model.completion: Real estate company with DSCR 1.2x. APPROVE — good fundamentals.
base_model.reasoning: Does not check macro environment or sector stress

fine_tuned.completion:
get_market_intelligence('Infrastructure')
[Macro stress: 0.72 HIGH STRESS | Sector NPA peer: 14%]
submit_decision('CONDITIONAL', 'Macro shock active, sector stress HIGH. Approving conditionally with 50% disbursement and quarterly review covenant. Monitoring NPA exposure.')
fine_tuned.reasoning: Calls market intelligence, adapts decision to macro state with conditions
